content: Completed: Full implementation of vitreous_reactive crate — signal-based reactivity system with Signal, Memo, Effect, Context, Scope, Resource, and thread-local Runtime. 10 files, 1885 lines, 22 tests passing. All AC-1 through AC-13 verified. AC-14 (proptest) and AC-15 (criterion benchmarks) deferred pending dev-dependency setup. Ready for human review and push.
